members.name: Arjun Mehta
members.tagline: Architecting the future, one Lambda at a time.
members.bio: A final-year Computer Science student with a passion for distributed systems. Arjun leads the club's vision and strategy, organizing flagship events and forging partnerships with AWS. He has deployed over 50 production workloads on AWS and mentors juniors on cloud architecture patterns.

members.name: Priya Sharma
members.tagline: Turning cloud ideas into production-ready systems.
members.bio: Priya specializes in serverless architectures and event-driven systems. As VP, she coordinates all workshop curricula and ensures hands-on learning is at the core of every session. She's built real-time data pipelines processing millions of events on AWS.

members.name: Rahul Verma
members.tagline: If it can be containerized, it will be.
members.bio: Rahul is the club's DevOps guru, responsible for managing all technical infrastructure and hands-on lab environments. He maintains the club's AWS organization account and writes Infrastructure as Code templates used in workshops.

members.name: Sneha Reddy
members.bio: Sneha orchestrates all club events from intimate study groups to the Annual Cloud Fest. With a background in marketing and tech, she ensures every event delivers maximum value and engagement. She's organized 30+ events with over 2000 cumulative attendees.

members.name: Vikram Joshi
members.bio: Vikram is a third-year student who has already earned his Solutions Architect Professional certification. He leads architecture review sessions and helps teams design their AWS infrastructure for scalability and cost optimization.

members.name: Ananya Gupta
members.tagline: Spreading the cloud gospel across campus.
members.bio: Ananya handles all club communications, social media, and branding. She designs promotional material, manages the club's online presence, and builds partnerships with other campus organizations to expand the club's reach.
